metadata.title: mogged | 1v1 Face Rating Arena
metadata.description: mogged is the 1v1 face rating arena on {{app_domain}}. Jump into mog battles, get AI-rated on facial biometrics, climb the ELO leaderboard from Molecule to Slayer.
metadata.keywords: mogged, mog battle, face rating, 1v1 mog, mogging, ELO ranking, leaderboard, looksmaxxing, {{app_domain}}
